name: Two-Cheese Fettuccine Primavera
recipeIngredient: 1 tbsp Liquid Butter Buds or 1 tb Fat-free chicken broth
1 Red bell pepper, cut into strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook fettuccine as directed on package.
2. In a 2-quart glass measure, combine onion, garlic, Butter Buds or chicken broth, basil, oregano, and black pepper. Cover with vented plastic wrap and microwave on high for 3 minutes.
3. Stir flour into the onion mixture.
4. Using a wire whisk in a salad bowl, blend milk into the mixture; cover again.
5. Microwave on high for 6-7 minutes, stirring every 2 minutes until thickened.
6. Stir mozzarella cheese into the sauce and set aside.
7. Place broccoli and bell pepper in a 1-quart casserole dish. Cover and microwave on high for 2-3 minutes.
8. Drain pasta and stir the reserved sauce with it along with the vegetables.
9. Sprinkle Parmesan cheese on top and serve immediately.
